title: T-122 — PARITY: Brief list + detail Playwright screenshot parity vs brief-screens.jsx — slice of T-034
prompt:
# T-122 — Brief module Playwright parity (slice of T-034)

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §9.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Parent root: T-034
Depends on: T-119, T-120, T-121

## Goal
Produce Playwright browser screenshot parity for Brief list and Brief detail vs the prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/brief-screens.jsx` (list 7-82, detail 84-231). Run axe accessibility scan with 0 violations.

## Implementation contract
- Playwright spec under `apps/web/e2e/(npd)/briefs.parity.spec.ts` that:
  - boots app with seeded brief data,
  - visits `/(npd)/briefs` and captures a screenshot diff vs prototype reference (or baseline screenshot),
  - visits `/(npd)/briefs/<id>` and captures detail screenshot,
  - runs `@axe-core/playwright` on both pages and asserts 0 violations.
- Attach traces/videos/screenshots to closeout per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
- If Playwright is unavailable in the harness, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Files in scope
- `apps/web/e2e/(npd)/briefs.parity.spec.ts [create]`
- `apps/web/e2e/(npd)/__fixtures__/briefs.ts [create-or-modify]`

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given Playwright runs the parity spec, when compared to brief-screens.jsx:7-82, then the brief list screenshot matches within tolerance.
2. Given Playwright runs the parity spec, when compared to brief-screens.jsx:84-231, then the brief detail screenshot matches within tolerance.
3. Given axe runs on both pages, when complete, then there are 0 violations on both.
4. Closeout attaches Playwright traces/screenshots/videos OR documents a blocker + RTL/snapshot fallback evidence per the parity policy.

## Test strategy
- Run: `pnpm --filter web e2e -- briefs.parity`.
- If headless browser missing, fall back to RTL snapshots and document deviation.

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify implementation code (T-119/T-120/T-121).
- Do not lower axe threshold above 0.
- Do not skip closeout artifact attachment.
